title: IIITM Gwalior – Assistant Engineer, Junior Engineer – 2 Posts
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior (IIITM Gwalior) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Assistant Engineer and Junior Engineer. Candidates with Diploma, B.E./B.Techa can apply Offline. The offline application process closes on 01-06-2026. Candidates shall apply through the IIITM Gwalior official website, iiitm.ac.in.

basic_details.job_title: IIITM Gwalior Non Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Engineer, Junior Engineer Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior (IIITM Gwalior) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Assistant Engineer and Junior Engineer. Candidates with Diploma, B.E./B.Techa can apply Offline. The offline application process closes on 01-06-2026. Candidates shall apply through the IIITM Gwalior official website, iiitm.ac.in.

age_limit.age_details: Assistant Engineer: Max 35 years (OBC), Junior Engineer: Max 32 years (SC)

qualification.education_qualification: 1st Class B.E./B.Tech. or Diploma in Electrical/Civil Engineering, Post qualification experience from IITs/IISc/IIMs/IIITs/NITs/IISERs or similar institutions/Govt Organizations/PSUs

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIITM Gwalior Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
